name_en: M83112 Canvas! (Makeup Bag) The Locker Dopp Kit combines modern style with Louis Vuitton's iconic elegance, crafted from the brand's classic Monogram Eclipse canvas. It features practical functions such as a washable lining and a comfortable, adjustable side handle. The compact design is surprisingly spacious enough to hold all essentials, perfectly blending style and utility. 23 x 13 x 12 cm (Length x Height x Width).
